ast.name: error
ast.source: forceFrameRate takes a positive int between 0 and 125, forcing frame rates higher than 125 fps is not supported
ast.target: forceFrameRate 接受一个介于0和125之间的正整数，不支持强制设置高于125 fps的帧率

ast.name: error
ast.source: No Intl support, please use an Intl polyfill!
ast.target: 不支持 Intl，请使用 Intl polyfill！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: accessing an object - but returnObjects options is not enabled!
ast.target: 正在访问一个对象 - 但未启用 returnObjects 选项！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Seems the loaded translations were in flat JSON format instead of nested. Either set keySeparator: false on init or make sure your translations are published in nested format.
ast.target: 似乎加载的翻译是扁平的JSON格式而不是嵌套格式。要么在初始化时设置 keySeparator: false，要么确保您的翻译以嵌套格式发布。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: This means something IS WRONG in your setup. You access the t function before i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage was done. Wait for the callback or Promise to resolve before accessing it!!!
ast.target: 这意味着您的设置中存在错误。您在 i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage 完成之前就访问了 t 函数。请在访问它之前等待回调或 Promise 解析完成！！！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No backend was added via i18next.use. Will not load resources.
ast.target: 未通过 i18next.use 添加后端。将不会加载资源。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: no languageDetector is used and no lng is defined
ast.target: init: 未使用 languageDetector 且未定义 lng

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: i18next is already initialized. You should call init just once!
ast.target: init: i18next 已经初始化。您应该只调用 init 一次！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: hasLoadedNamespace: i18n.languages were undefined or empty
ast.target: hasLoadedNamespace: i18n.languages 未定义或为空

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [visx/scale/applyRound] ignoring round: scale config contains round and interpolate. only applying interpolate. config:
ast.target: [visx/scale/applyRound] 忽略 round: scale 配置包含 round 和 interpolate。只应用 interpolate。配置：
